header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white py-4 border-b-2 border-[#FFDE00]

search.style: flex-1 max-w-xl mx-4 rounded-full px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2

actions.cart_badge: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full absolute -top-2 -right-2

sidebar.style: fixed right-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white z-[60] p-6 shadow-2xl transition-transform
sidebar.links: text-lg font-bold py-3 border-b border-white/10 hover:text-[#FFDE00] transition-colors block

categories.item_style: bg-[#FFDE00] text-[#0A0A0A] aspect-square flex items-center justify-center p-4 text-center font-black text-sm md:text-base border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0_#0A0A0A] uppercase transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0_#0A0A0A]

filters.button_style: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full px-6 py-2 text-sm font-bold flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white transition-colors

product_card.wrapper_style: group flex flex-col relative border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] bg-white transition-all hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0_#0A0A0A]
product_card.image_container: relative aspect-[4/5] bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A]

stickers.comfort: absolute bottom-2 left-2 bg-white text-black text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 border border-black rounded-full
stickers.identity: absolute bottom-2 left-[70px] bg-black text-white text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full
stickers.discount: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white text-xs font-black px-2 py-1
stickers.heart: absolute top-2 right-2 text-black bg-white/80 p-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-[#FF3B30] hover:text-white transition-colors

product_card.title: text-sm font-bold text-[#0A0A0A] uppercase truncate
product_card.button_style: mt-3 w-full bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white py-2.5 font-bold text-sm uppercase hover:bg-[#FFDE00] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors border-t-2 border-[#0A0A0A]

footer.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white pt-12 pb-24 px-6 mt-20 border-t-4 border-[#FFDE00]
footer.platform_badge: flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-12 pt-6 border-t border-white/10
footer.whatsapp_fab: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50

interactive_elements.hover_states: Hard background color swaps, sharp translations (-translate-y-1), and brutalist shadow expansions.
interactive_elements.animations: Framer motion for the sidebar slide-in (right-to-left) and micro-interactions on product hover.

hero_banner.description: Two young men modeling streetwear fashion in an urban setting

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Arabic First (RTL) website. Enforce `dir='rtl'` on the root HTML or main wrapper.
Use strict brutalist aesthetics: sharp borders (border-2 border-black), heavy drop shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0_#000]), and NO soft rounded corners (rounded-none).
Header must stick to the top. From right to left visually: Logo (Gold on Black) -> Search Bar (White) -> Icons (Hamburger, Login, Cart).
Cart badge must use the #FF3B30 color to indicate items, and show '0' if empty as requested.
Ensure the categories grid specifically renders 'T-SHIRTS' on a new line on smaller screens (e.g. col-span-full for the last item).
Product buttons should display 'تحديد أحد الخيارات' (Select an option) or 'إضافة إلى السلة' (Add to cart).
Sidebar should animate from the right edge. Use Framer Motion to slide it in.
In the Footer, include social media icons and the WhatsApp floating button at the bottom-left (due to RTL, visually left, or stick to right corner as universally expected).
Font choices are crucial: Use an Arabic display font like 'Cairo' or 'Tajawal' with bold/black weights for all headings, price tags, and yellow category boxes.
All interactive elements must have semantic data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-toggle-btn').
